messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Onboarding Program' for new hires joining our HR department. The presentation should consist of 18 slides using a friendly and modern theme with rounded corners and soft colors. Use German for all content and set the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the output file as onboarding_prog.pptx. You are strictly prohibited from using external APIs or web scraping. When creating charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Furthermore, any attempt to set text on a title shape must first check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x4A, 0x90, 0xD9)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xBB, 0xD0)
TERTIARY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)
LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xFA, 0xFB, 0xFC)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
ACCENT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x70, 0x43)
SOFT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF5, 0xF5)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
MINT_GREEN = RGBColor(0xA5, 0xD6, 0xA7)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(0xBB, 0xDE, 0xFB)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FAFBFC"):
    bg_color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = "Calibri"
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
    if body:
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = body
        run.font.size = Pt(11)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.35), Inches(1.2), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY
    line_shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x, y - Inches(0.1), Inches(6), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=28, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=18):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY
    bar.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(3), Inches(0.35), "HR Onboarding-Programm", font_size=9, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SOFT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), "Bild-Platzhalter", font_size=10, color=RGBColor(0x99, 0x99, 0x99), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_circle_icon(slide, left, top, size, fill_color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_arrow_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    connector.line.width = Pt(2)
    return connector


def add_bullet_text(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=11):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(4)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"


def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#4A90D9")

    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(5.2), Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), RGBColor(0x3A, 0x7C, 0xC8))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), "HR", font_size=20, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(-0.3), Inches(-0.3), Inches(2.5), RGBColor(0xF8, 0xBB, 0xD0))
    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(2.0), RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "Willkommen im HR-Team!", font_size=44, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.6), "Onboarding-Programm für neue Mitarbeiter", font_size=22, color=RGBColor(0xE0, 0xEB, 0xF4), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.5), "Wir freuen uns auf dich!", font_size=16, color=RGBColor(0xBB, 0xDE, 0xFB), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Inhaltsverzeichnis", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    agenda_items = [
        ("1.", "Über uns & unsere Werte"),
        ("2.", "Die HR-Abteilung kennenlernen"),
        ("3.", "Dein erster Tag"),
        ("4.", "Büro & Umgebung"),
        ("5.", "IT & Zugänge"),
        ("6.", "Arbeitszeiten & Pausen"),
        ("7.", "Urlaub & Feiertage"),
        ("8.", "Gehalt & Leistungen"),
        ("9.", "Gesundheitsvorsorge"),
        ("10.", "Fortbildungen & Entwicklung"),
    ]

    for i, (num, item) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = Inches(1.3) + Inches(i * 0.52)
        add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(1.0), y - Inches(0.08), Inches(0.4), PRIMARY if i % 2 == 0 else ACCENT_ORANGE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.6), y, Inches(9), Inches(0.35), f"{num} {item}", font_size=14, color=DARK_TEXT)

    agenda_items_2 = [
        ("11.", "Feedback & Bewertung"),
        ("12.", "Team & Kultur"),
        ("13.", "Wichtige Kontakte"),
        ("14.", "FAQ"),
        ("15.", "Abschluss & Dankeschön"),
    ]

    for i, (num, item) in enumerate(agenda_items_2):
        y = Inches(6.0) + Inches(i * 0.38)
        add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(1.0), y - Inches(0.05), Inches(0.3), PRIMARY if i % 2 == 0 else MINT_GREEN)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), y, Inches(9), Inches(0.3), f"{num} {item}", font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_3_about(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Über uns", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(4), Inches(0.35), "Unsere Geschichte", font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(1.5), "Seit über 20 Jahren gestalten wir die Zukunft der Personalarbeit. Unser Team vereint Erfahrung, Innovation und Leidenschaft für Menschen.", font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), "Unsere Mission", "Menschen am Arbeitsplatz erfolgreich machen durch moderne HR-Lösungen und persönliche Betreuung.")
    add_card(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), "Unsere Vision", "Eine Welt, in der jeder Mensch seine Arbeit mit Freude und Sinn erfüllt.")

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_4_values(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Unsere Werte", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    values_data = [
        ("Zusammenarbeit", "Wir arbeiten gemeinsam und unterstützen uns gegenseitig.", PRIMARY, LIGHT_BLUE),
        ("Innovation", "Wir denken neu und finden kreative Lösungen.", ACCENT_ORANGE, RGBColor(0xFF, 0xCC, 0xBC)),
        ("Respekt", "Wir behandeln jeden mit Würde und Wertschätzung.", MINT_GREEN, RGBColor(0xC8, 0xE6, 0xC9)),
    ]

    for i, (title, body, icon_color, card_bg) in enumerate(values_data):
        x = Inches(1.2 + i * 3.7)
        add_circle_icon(slide, x + Inches(1.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.0), icon_color)
        add_text_box(slide, x, Inches(2.6), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_card(slide, x + Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(2.5), Inches(2.5), body=None, bg_color=card_bg, border_color=icon_color)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.7), Inches(3.4), Inches(2.1), Inches(2.0))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = body
        run.font.size = Pt(11)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_5_hr_dept(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Die HR-Abteilung", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    roles = [
        ("HR-Leitung", "Leitung & Strategie"),
        ("Recruiting", "Personalgewinnung"),
        ("Personalentwicklung", "Schulungen & Coaching"),
        ("Gehalt & Leistungen", "Vergütung & Benefits"),
        ("Mitarbeiterbetreuung", "Support & Beratung"),
    ]

    for i, (role, desc) in enumerate(roles):
        x = Inches(1.0 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(2.0), role, desc, bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE if i % 2 == 0 else RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(11), Inches(0.35), "Unsere Abteilung im Überblick", font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
    add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(11), Inches(2.0), body="Das HR-Team besteht aus 25 erfahrenen Mitarbeitern in fünf Abteilungen. Wir sind für alle Belange rund um die Mitarbeiterentwicklung zuständig und stehen dir jederzeit zur Verfügung.", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_6_first_day(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Dein erster Tag", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    schedule = [
        ("09:00 – 10:00", "Begrüßung durch HR & Büro-Einführung"),
        ("10:00 – 12:00", "IT-Ausstattung & Systemzugang einrichten"),
        ("12:00 – 13:00", "Mittagessen mit dem Team"),
        ("13:00 – 15:00", "Einarbeitung in die Arbeitsprozesse"),
        ("15:00 – 16:30", "Team-Meeting & Vorstellungsrunde"),
    ]

    for i, (time, activity) in enumerate(schedule):
        y = Inches(1.4 + i * 1.0)
        add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), y, Inches(2.5), Inches(0.8), time, None, bg_color=PRIMARY if i % 2 == 0 else ACCENT_ORANGE, border_color=PRIMARY)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(3.7), y + Inches(0.1), Inches(7), Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = activity
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_7_office(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Büro & Umgebung", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    areas = ["Meeting-Raum A", "Küche & Lounge", "Arbeitsplätze", "Pausenraum", "Besprechungsraum B", "Eingangsbereich"]
    for i in range(6):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(1.0 + col * 4.0)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, f"assets/office_{i}.jpg", x, y, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.2))
        add_text_box(slide, x, y + Inches(2.3), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3), areas[i], font_size=11, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_8_it(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "IT & Zugänge", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    it_items = [
        ("Laptop einrichten", "Dein Firmenlaptop wird dir am ersten Tag ausgehändigt. Bitte installiere die erforderlichen Programme gemäß der Anleitung."),
        ("E-Mail-Konto erstellen", "Du erhältst deine Firmen-E-Mail-Adresse und Zugangsdaten per Post. Aktiviere dein Konto innerhalb von 48 Stunden."),
        ("Systemzugänge", "Zugang zu internen Systemen (CRM, HR-Portal, Zeiterfassung) wird vom IT-Support eingerichtet."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(it_items):
        y = Inches(1.5 + i * 1.8)
        add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), y, Inches(11), Inches(1.4), title, body, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY if i % 2 == 0 else ACCENT_ORANGE)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_9_hours(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Arbeitszeiten & Pausen", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5), "Arbeitszeit", None, bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE, border_color=PRIMARY)
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.3), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.8))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    hours_items = ["Regelarbeitszeit: 08:00 – 17:00 Uhr", "Pünktlichkeit wird erwartet", "Flexible Arbeitszeiten möglich nach Absprache", "Homeoffice: bis zu 2 Tage pro Woche"]
    for j, item in enumerate(hours_items):
        p = tf.paragraphs[0] if j == 0 else tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5), "Pausenregelung", None, bg_color=RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=MINT_GREEN)
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(7.1), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.8))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    break_items = ["Mittagspause: 60 Minuten", "Kaffeepause: 2 × 15 Minuten", "Pausen sind im Arbeitsvertrag geregelt", "Pause bitte im System eintragen"]
    for j, item in enumerate(break_items):
        p = tf.paragraphs[0] if j == 0 else tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_vacation(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Urlaub & Feiertage", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(2.5), "Jahresurlaub", "Mitarbeiter erhalten 30 Tage Urlaub pro Jahr. Der Antrag wird über das HR-Portal gestellt.", bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE, border_color=PRIMARY)
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(2.5), "Feiertage", "In Deutschland gelten 10–13 gesetzliche Feiertage je nach Bundesland.", bg_color=RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=MINT_GREEN)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Jan", "Feb", "Mär", "Apr", "Mai", "Jun"]
    chart_data.add_series("Genommene Tage", (3, 5, 2, 4, 6, 3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.2), Inches(9.5), Inches(2.8), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def slide_11_benefits(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Gehalt & Leistungen", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    benefits = [
        ("Attraktives Gehalt", "Leistungsgerechte Bezahlung mit jährlicher Anpassung."),
        ("Krankenversicherung", "Vollständige Absicherung durch betriebliche Krankenversicherung."),
        ("Betriebliche Rente", "Zusätzliche Altersvorsorge durch den Arbeitgeber."),
        ("Jahresbonus", "Leistungsabhängiger Bonus nach erfolgreichem Jahr."),
        ("Weiterbildung", "Budget für Schulungen, Konferenzen und Zertifikate."),
        ("Homeoffice", "Flexibles Arbeiten von zu Hause aus möglich."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(benefits):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(1.0 + col * 4.0)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        bg_colors = [LIGHT_BLUE, RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), RGBColor(0xFF, 0xEB, 0xEE)]
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.4), title, body, bg_color=bg_colors[row], border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 11)


def slide_12_wellness(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#E8F5E9")
    add_section_label(slide, "Gesundheitsvorsorge", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    wellness_items = [
        ("Fitness & Sport", "Betriebliches Fitnessprogramm mit vergünstigtem Mitgliedschaftsbeitrag."),
        ("Ergonomie am Arbeitsplatz", "Individuelle Beratung und Ausstattung für ergonomisches Arbeiten."),
        ("Mental Health", "Zugang zu Coaching, Meditations-Apps und psychologischer Beratung."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(wellness_items):
        x = Inches(1.0 + i * 4.0)
        add_circle_icon(slide, x + Inches(1.2), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.0), MINT_GREEN)
        add_text_box(slide, x, Inches(2.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), Inches(3.2), Inches(3.0), Inches(2.5))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = body
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer(slide, 12)


def slide_13_training(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Fortbildungen & Entwicklung", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    stages = [
        ("Einstieg", "Einarbeitung\n2–4 Wochen"),
        ("Grundlagen", "Schulungen\n1–3 Monate"),
        ("Kompetenz", "Selbstständiges Arbeiten\n3–6 Monate"),
        ("Experte", "Spezialisierung\n6+ Monate"),
    ]

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(stages):
        x = Inches(1.0 + i * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.3), Inches(2.5), title, desc, bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE if i % 2 == 0 else RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=PRIMARY)

    for i in range(len(stages) - 1):
        x_start = Inches(3.3 + i * 2.8)
        y_pos = Inches(2.7)
        add_arrow_line(slide, x_start, y_pos, x_start + Inches(0.5), y_pos)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.35), "Dein persönlicher Entwicklungsplan", font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
    add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(11), Inches(2.0), body="Wir unterstützen dich bei deiner beruflichen Entwicklung durch individuelle Schulungen, Mentoring-Programme und regelmäßige Feedbackgespräche.", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 13)


def slide_14_feedback(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Feedback & Bewertung", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5), "Feedback-Zyklus", None, bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE, border_color=PRIMARY)
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.3), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.8))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    cycle_items = ["Quartalsgespräche mit Vorgesetzten", "360°-Feedback alle 6 Monate", "Jahresbeurteilung im Dezember", "Entwicklungsgespräch im März"]
    for j, item in enumerate(cycle_items):
        p = tf.paragraphs[0] if j == 0 else tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_card(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5), "Bewertungskriterien", None, bg_color=RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=MINT_GREEN)
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(7.1), Inches(1.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.8))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    criteria_items = ["Arbeitsleistung & Qualität", "Teamarbeit & Kommunikation", "Initiative & Eigenverantwortung", "Lernbereitschaft & Entwicklung"]
    for j, item in enumerate(criteria_items):
        p = tf.paragraphs[0] if j == 0 else tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer(slide, 14)


def slide_15_team(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Team & Kultur", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/team_photo.jpg", Inches(1.0), Inches(1.3), Inches(11), Inches(2.5))

    culture_items = [
        ("Regelmäßige Teamevents", "Quarterly Team-Outings und Feiern."),
        ("Offene Kommunikation", "Tür offen – sprich jeden an."),
        ("Work-Life-Balance", "Wir schätzen deine Freizeit."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(culture_items):
        x = Inches(1.0 + i * 4.0)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(4.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(2.6), title, body, bg_color=LIGHT_BLUE if i % 2 == 0 else RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9), border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 15)


def slide_16_contacts(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Wichtige Kontakte", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    contacts = [
        ("Anna Schmidt", "HR-Leitung", "anna.schmidt@firma.de"),
        ("Thomas Müller", "Recruiting", "thomas.mueller@firma.de"),
        ("Lisa Weber", "Personalentwicklung", "lisa.weber@firma.de"),
        ("Markus Klein", "Gehalt & Leistungen", "markus.klein@firma.de"),
        ("Sarah Fischer", "Mitarbeiterbetreuung", "sarah.fischer@firma.de"),
        ("Jan Becker", "IT-Support", "jan.becker@firma.de"),
    ]

    for i, (name, role, email) in enumerate(contacts):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = Inches(1.0 + col * 4.0)
        y = Inches(1.5 + row * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.4), name, f"{role}\n{email}", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY)
        add_circle_icon(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6), PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 16)


def slide_17_faq(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FAFBFC")
    add_section_label(slide, "Häufig gestellte Fragen", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5))

    faq_items = [
        ("Wie beantrage ich Urlaub?", "Über das HR-Portal oder per E-Mail an hr@firma.de."),
        ("Wo finde ich meinen Ausweis?", "Am Empfang im Erdgeschoss nach dem ersten Tag."),
        ("Wer ist mein Ansprechpartner bei Fragen?", "Dein Vorgesetzter oder die Mitarbeiterbetreuung."),
        ("Wie funktioniert Homeoffice?", "Anmeldung über das HR-Portal, max. 2 Tage pro Woche."),
        ("Gibt es ein Mentoring-Programm?", "Ja – wir ordnen jedem neuen Mitarbeiter einen Mentor zu."),
    ]

    for i, (question, answer) in enumerate(faq_items):
        y = Inches(1.3 + i * 1.05)
        bg_color = LIGHT_BLUE if i % 2 == 0 else RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9)
        add_card(slide, Inches(1.0), y, Inches(11), Inches(0.9), question, answer, bg_color=bg_color, border_color=PRIMARY)

    add_footer(slide, 17)


def slide_18_thankyou(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#4A90D9")

    for i in range(20):
        x = Inches((i * 0.7) % 13)
        y = Inches((i * 0.5) % 7.5)
        size = Inches(0.1 + (i % 4) * 0.08)
        colors = [SECONDARY, MINT_GREEN, RGBColor(0xFF, 0xCC, 0xBC), WHITE]
        add_circle_icon(slide, x, y, size, colors[i % len(colors)])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "Vielen Dank für deinen Einsatz!", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(3.5), Inches(7), Inches(0.6), "Wir freuen uns auf die Zusammenarbeit mit dir.", font_size=20, color=RGBColor(0xE0, 0xEB, 0xF4), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "HR-Abteilung | hr@firma.de | +49 123 456789", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(0xBB, 0xDE, 0xFB), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 18)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_agenda(prs)
    slide_3_about(prs)
    slide_4_values(prs)
    slide_5_hr_dept(prs)
    slide_6_first_day(prs)
    slide_7_office(prs)
    slide_8_it(prs)
    slide_9_hours(prs)
    slide_10_vacation(prs)
    slide_11_benefits(prs)
    slide_12_wellness(prs)
    slide_13_training(prs)
    slide_14_feedback(prs)
    slide_15_team(prs)
    slide_16_contacts(prs)
    slide_17_faq(prs)
    slide_18_thankyou(prs)

    prs.save("onboarding_prog.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
